system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'

raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: Convert quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO → order — PO + BOM + ATP attached", "body": "Dear Aurora Automotive Electronics Procurement Team,

Thank you for your purchase order PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-72296 issued against quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO. We are pleased to confirm that your order has been accepted and converted, and acknowledge receipt within the requested 2 business days.

Order confirmation details:
- Sales Order Number: SO-QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO-1986
- PO Number: PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-72296
- Quote Reference: QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO
- Requested Ship Date: 2026-05-26
- Payment Terms: Net 45
- Order Total: USD 66,250.00

Line items:
1. MSOS804A — Infiniium S-Series Oscilloscope, 8 GHz, 4 analog + 16 digital — Qty 1 @ USD 56,400.00
2. B2902B — Precision Source/Measure Unit, 2-Ch, 10 fA / 100 nV — Qty 1 @ USD 8,400.00
3. CAL-A2LA-1Y — Calibration Service, A2LA/ISO 17025 traceable, 1-year — Qty 1 @ USD 1,450.00

Bill To:
Aurora Automotive Electronics
Accounts Payable — Americas
ee.procurement@auroraauto.com

Ship To:
Aurora Automotive Electronics
Receiving Dock — Americas
Attn: Lab Operations

All shipments will reference your PO number on packing slips and invoices as requested. Your acceptance test plan has been logged against the order.

Regarding your specific requests: the Statement of Acknowledgment (SOA), the projected ship date, and confirmation on A2LA-traceable calibration certificates will be provided by our order management team in a follow-up communication once scheduling is finalized.

Please reference Sales Order SO-QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO-1986 in any future correspondence regarding this order.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team"}

parsed.subject: Re: Convert quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO → order — PO + BOM + ATP attached
parsed.body:
Dear Aurora Automotive Electronics Procurement Team,

Thank you for your purchase order PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-72296 issued against quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO. We are pleased to confirm that your order has been accepted and converted, and acknowledge receipt within the requested 2 business days.

Order confirmation details:
- Sales Order Number: SO-QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO-1986
- PO Number: PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-72296
- Quote Reference: QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO
- Requested Ship Date: 2026-05-26
- Payment Terms: Net 45
- Order Total: USD 66,250.00

Line items:
1. MSOS804A — Infiniium S-Series Oscilloscope, 8 GHz, 4 analog + 16 digital — Qty 1 @ USD 56,400.00
2. B2902B — Precision Source/Measure Unit, 2-Ch, 10 fA / 100 nV — Qty 1 @ USD 8,400.00
3. CAL-A2LA-1Y — Calibration Service, A2LA/ISO 17025 traceable, 1-year — Qty 1 @ USD 1,450.00

Bill To:
Aurora Automotive Electronics
Accounts Payable — Americas
ee.procurement@auroraauto.com

Ship To:
Aurora Automotive Electronics
Receiving Dock — Americas
Attn: Lab Operations

All shipments will reference your PO number on packing slips and invoices as requested. Your acceptance test plan has been logged against the order.

Regarding your specific requests: the Statement of Acknowledgment (SOA), the projected ship date, and confirmation on A2LA-traceable calibration certificates will be provided by our order management team in a follow-up communication once scheduling is finalized.

Please reference Sales Order SO-QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO-1986 in any future correspondence regarding this order.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps Team
